tasks.title: Research Claude, Codex, GitHub, GitNexus, context-and-impact, and Miyabi boundaries before further implementation

Document already-implemented substrate and required follow-up for workflows, docs, and external dependencies
Align AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, workflow claims, and runtime contracts with the revised architecture
Introduce a .claude/agents markdown loader and runtime registry before adding more agent behavior
Implement the safe Phase 3 handler slice: issue/review runtime hooks, local PR artifact generation, deployment opt-in gate, and generic fallback routing
Align autonomous-agent workflow comments and job summary with real execution report artifacts
Clarify or reduce sibling-repo dependencies for miyabi, context-and-impact, and agent-skill-bus
Vendor the lightweight E:Stack plan/enforcer contract locally while keeping l1/quality/classify as explicit context-and-impact bridges
Rewrite .claude/commands/miyabi-* as optional external bridge surfaces with truthful repo-local alternatives
Align AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and GitNexus skills with the actual local CLI and agent-graph MCP surfaces
Add MIYABI_CLI / MIYABI_ROOT override support to the optional Miyabi MCP bridge and remove bare miyabi shell assumptions
